steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content:
Starting with $5x + 3 = 52$, subtract 3 from both sides:
$$5x = 49$$
Divide both sides by 5:
$$x = \frac{49}{5}$$

steps.title: Determine the number of solutions
steps.content: The equation yields exactly one solution: $x = \frac{49}{5}$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
